SceneText.FriendlyName: 街・Ａルート・昼・短縮済み

Entry.JapaneseText: Spada
Entry.EnglishText: Spada

Entry.JapaneseText: Marta
Entry.EnglishText: Marta

Entry.JapaneseText: Ruca
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: Emil
Entry.EnglishText: Emil

Entry.JapaneseText: Young Man A
Entry.EnglishText: Young Man A

Entry.JapaneseText: System
Entry.EnglishText: System

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・開始！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Start!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・成功！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Success!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・失敗！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Failed!

Entry.JapaneseText: 確認用ミッション
Entry.EnglishText: Confirm Mission

Entry.JapaneseText: 女だからって手加減はしねぇぞ
Entry.EnglishText: I ain't goin' easy on ya just 'cause you're a woman.

Entry.JapaneseText: そっちこそ！ 怪我しても恨まないでよね、チンピラさん
Entry.EnglishText: Right back at you! Don't hold a grudge against me if you get hurt, mister delinquent.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ開始 | マルタ・会話１：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_C0020_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ、どうしてこんな事に……
Entry.EnglishText: Ahhh, how did it end up like this...
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ開始 | ルカ・会話１：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_C0030_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: いくぜぇ！ 俺にケンカ売った事後悔させてやるよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's do this! I'll make you regret picking a fight with me!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ開始 | エミルＲ・会話１：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_C0040_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: え！？ あの人、さっきと様子が……
Entry.EnglishText: Huh?! That person seems different from before...
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ開始 | ルカ・会話１：５ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_C0050_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ケンカだー！ ケンカ祭りだ！ やっちまえ！
Entry.EnglishText: It's a fiiight! It's a fight festival! Let's get 'em!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ開始 | 若者・会話１：６ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_C0060_114.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 血気盛んな街の若者達が、祭り気分で乱入！
Entry.EnglishText: The hot-blooded young folks from the town burst in with their festive spirit!
Entry.Notes: ステージ開始 | 天の声・天の声：１

Entry.JapaneseText: 若者のケンカ祭を突破し、マルタ達とのケンカに勝利せよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Break through the young folks' fight festival and win the fight against Marta and Emil!
Entry.Notes: ステージ開始 | 天の声・天の声：２

Entry.JapaneseText: ウゼェな！ 弱ェくせにカラんでくんじゃねェよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Goddamn annoyin'! Don't pick a fight with me if you're that damn weak!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | スパーダ・会話２：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_D0010_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: スパーダ！ あんまり乱暴な事はしないで！
Entry.EnglishText: Spada! Don't be so rough with them!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | ルカ・会話２：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_D0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ごめんなさい！ ごめんなさい！
Entry.EnglishText: I'm sorry! I'm sorry!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | ルカ・会話２：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_D0030_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ヒャヒャヒャ、全員ブチのめしてやるぜー！
Entry.EnglishText: Hyahahehe! Let's knock 'em all flat on their asses!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | スパーダ・会話２：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_D0040_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: どういうコンビだよ、あれは
Entry.EnglishText: The heck kind of duo are they?
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | エミルＲ・会話２：５ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_D0050_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: エミル、先陣を切って戦闘に出撃！
Entry.EnglishText: Emil leads the charge and sorties into battle!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中１ | 天の声・天の声：３

Entry.JapaneseText: チンピラなんか倒して、早く世界樹に向かおう、エミル！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's beat this delinquent and hurry on to the World Tree!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | マルタ・会話３：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_E0010_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: え？ 君達も世界樹に向かってるの？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Are you guys going to the World Tree too?
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | ルカ・会話３：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_E0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: てめぇには関係ねぇだろ！ 黙って俺にやられてろ！
Entry.EnglishText: This has nothin' to do with you! Shut your trap and let me knock you out already!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | エミルＲ・会話３：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_E0030_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: いいねぇ。さっきのは優等生のふりだったってか？
Entry.EnglishText: Nice. So you were just pretendin' to be an honors student?
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | スパーダ・会話３：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_E0040_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: こっちの方が話が早くてオレは好きだぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: I like it more that way, 'cause it gets this whole thing wrapped up faster!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | スパーダ・会話３：５ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_E0050_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: エミル、態勢を立て直す為に後退！
Entry.EnglishText: Emil retreats to recover his strength!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ステージ途中２ | 天の声・天の声：４

Entry.JapaneseText: キミ、このチンピラに無理やり戦わされてるんでしょ？
Entry.EnglishText: You're being forced to fight with this delinquent against your will, aren't you?
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 ＶＳエミル・マルタ | マルタ・会話４：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_F0010_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: え、僕は……
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? I'm...
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 ＶＳエミル・マルタ | ルカ・会話４：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_F0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 待っててね！ 今チンピラを倒してキミを助けてあげるから
Entry.EnglishText: Just wait! I'll beat this delinquent right now and save you.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 ＶＳエミル・マルタ | マルタ・会話４：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_F0030_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: うわっウゼ。思い込み強い女とかサイアクだな
Entry.EnglishText: Uwah, how annoyin'. Women who assume too much are the worst.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 ＶＳエミル・マルタ | スパーダ・会話４：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_F0040_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕は……僕は無理やり戦わされてなんかいない
Entry.EnglishText: I'm... I'm not being forced to fight.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦途中 | ルカ・会話５：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_G0010_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 決めたんだ、世界樹に向かうって。自分で決めたんだ
Entry.EnglishText: I've decided I'm going to the World Tree. I decided that on my own.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦途中 | ルカ・会話５：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_G0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: へっ、言うじゃねぇか、ルカ。少しは見直したぜ
Entry.EnglishText: Heh, not bad, Ruca. I'll have to rethink my opinion of ya a bit.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦途中 | スパーダ・会話５：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_G0030_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 世界樹に向かう？ 無理だな、お前らみたいな雑魚じゃ
Entry.EnglishText: Going to the World Tree? No way, guys like you are too weak for that.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦途中 | エミルＲ・会話５：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_G0040_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: よくもエミルを！ もう許さないんだから！
Entry.EnglishText: How dare you do that to Emil! I'll never forgive you!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 先にエミル撃破 | マルタ・会話６：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_H0010_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: マルターーーー！！！
Entry.EnglishText: MARTAAAAA!!!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 先にマルタ撃破 | エミルＲ・会話７：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_I0010_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: てめぇらもう容赦しねぇ！ 叩きつぶしてやる！
Entry.EnglishText: I ain't showin' you any more mercy! I'm gonna wipe the floor with you!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦 先にマルタ撃破 | エミルＲ・会話７：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_I0020_036.na

Entry.JapaneseText: こんなチンピラに負けるなんて！
Entry.EnglishText: I didn't think I would lose to such a delinquent!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦勝利 | マルタ・会話８：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_J0010_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 誰がチンピラだぁ！？ 誰がよぉ！
Entry.EnglishText: Who's the delinquent here?! Who is it, huh?!
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦勝利 | スパーダ・会話８：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_J0020_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: スパーダ……チンピラを否定出来る言葉遣いじゃないってば
Entry.EnglishText: Spada... that's not how you should be talking if you wanna refute her delinquent claims.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦勝利 | ルカ・会話８：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_J0030_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: な〜んだ！ やっぱりチンピラって口ばっかりだね
Entry.EnglishText: What's thiiis?! Delinquents are nothing but talk after all, huh.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦敗北 | マルタ・会話９：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_K0010_022.na

Entry.JapaneseText: テメェ……マジ覚えとけよ
Entry.EnglishText: Damn you... I'm seriously gonna remember this.
Entry.Notes: Iスパーダ編／ボス戦敗北 | スパーダ・会話９：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S101_K0020_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ３０秒以内に３５Ｋ．Ｏ．を決めろ！
Entry.EnglishText: Get 35 KOs in 30 seconds!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／開始 | ダイアログ・通達：１

Entry.JapaneseText: ボーナス宝箱出現！
Entry.EnglishText: A bonus treasure chest has appeared!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／成功 | ダイアログ・通達：２

Entry.JapaneseText: 先へ進め！
Entry.EnglishText: Proceed onward!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／失敗 | ダイアログ・通達：３

Entry.JapaneseText: 判定チェック用です。後日消去します
Entry.EnglishText: This is for verification purposes. It will be deleted later.
Entry.Notes: ミッション２／実験 | ダイアログ・通達：４
